name: Speed-to-Lead — New Patient Intake
description: When a new-patient intake form is submitted, text the prospect within 2 minutes, run a short SMS conversation to confirm insurance, book them into the next new-patient consultation slot if qualified, and email a confirmation.

args.body: Hi {{name}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — thanks for reaching out! Happy to get you in soon. Can I ask a couple quick questions to find the best time?

steps.initial_message: First — do you have dental insurance you'd like us to check, or will this be self-pay?
steps.exit_when: The prospect has confirmed whether they have insurance, and stated at least one day/time that works for them.

steps.condition: insurance_status is 'yes' or 'self-pay / no' and preferred_time is provided

args.subject: You're booked at Bright Smile Dental
args.body: Hi {{name}}, we're confirmed for your new-patient consultation. Clinic address: 123 Main St, Laval. See you soon!
No worries — I'll have our scheduler reach out directly. Talk soon!
